mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_SUPPORT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
insert into support (SUPPORT_ID, MEMBER_ID, CONTENT, STATUS, CREATE_DATE, title, support_type )values( #{supportId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, 'N', SYSDATE, #{title}, #{supportType} )
mapper.select: SELECT SUPPORT_ID as supportId, MEMBER_ID as memberId, CONTENT as content, STATUS as status, CREATE_DATE AS createDate, TITLE as title, SUPPORT_TYPE AS supportType FROM SUPPORT where member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT S.SUPPORT_ID, S.MEMBER_ID, S.CONTENT AS S_CONTENT, S.STATUS, S.CREATE_DATE AS S_CREATE_DATE, S.TITLE, S.SUPPORT_TYPE, R.REPLY_ID, R.CONTENT AS REPLY_CONTENT, R.CREATE_DATE AS REPLY_DATE FROM SUPPORT S LEFT JOIN SUPPORT_REPLY R ON S.SUPPORT_ID = R.SUPPORT_ID ORDER BY S.CREATE_DATE DESC
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO SUPPORT_REPLY R USING DUAL ON (R.SUPPORT_ID = #{supportId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CONTENT = #{replyContent}, CREATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (REPLY_ID, SUPPORT_ID, MEMBER_ID, CONTENT, CREATE_DATE) VALUES (SEQ_SUPPORT_REPLY.NEXTVAL, #{supportId}, #{memberId}, #{replyContent}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT S.SUPPORT_ID, S.MEMBER_ID, S.STATUS, S.TITLE, S.SUPPORT_TYPE, S.CONTENT AS S_CONTENT, S.CREATE_DATE AS S_CREATE_DATE, F.FILE_ID, F.SAVE_FILE_NAME, F.FILE_PATH, R.REPLY_ID, R.CONTENT AS REPLY_CONTENT, R.CREATE_DATE AS REPLY_DATE FROM SUPPORT S LEFT JOIN SUPPORT_FILE F ON S.SUPPORT_ID = F.SUPPORT_ID LEFT JOIN SUPPORT_REPLY R ON S.SUPPORT_ID = R.SUPPORT_ID WHERE S.SUPPORT_ID = #{supportId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SUPPORT_FILE ( FILE_ID, SUPPORT_ID, ORIGIN_FILE_NAME, SAVE_FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, CREATE_DATE, IS_IMAGE ) VALUES ( SEQ_SUPPORT_FILE.NEXTVAL, #{supportId}, #{originFileName}, #{saveFileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, SYSDATE, #{isImage, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE SUPPORT SET TITLE = #{title}, SUPPORT_TYPE = #{supportType}, CONTENT = #{content}, CREATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SUPPORT_ID = #{supportId}
